readings.Aries: Someone is ready to follow your lead. Be worth following. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Taurus: Your sense of value — what things are worth, what people cost — is usually accurate. Check it again today. One conversation today matters more than the rest combined.
readings.Gemini: Your cross-talk with the world is high. Reduce cognitive load; something important is trying to get through. You already have what you need to take the next step.
readings.Cancer: Your intuition is more accurate than your analysis right now. Trust the feeling. Small, deliberate, and patient — that's the mode today.
readings.Leo: You contain more generosity than you sometimes access. Today, go deeper. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Virgo: Your willingness to work harder than necessary has served you. It has also cost you things. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Libra: The relationship is worth saving. Saving it requires saying the uncomfortable thing. Act from the calmest part of yourself.
readings.Scorpio: You've been managing your own depth to avoid frightening people. Today, someone can handle it. Something you've been measuring incorrectly just corrected itself.
readings.Sagittarius: There is a commitment you made lightly that another person is holding seriously. Honour it. Go back to the original intention — it's still the right one.
readings.Capricorn: The goal is real. The version of you who needs to achieve it at the cost of everything else — reconsider. Say the thing you've been rehearsing.
readings.Aquarius: Your version of intimacy is unusual and real. Someone is trying to understand it. Help them. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.
readings.Pisces: The thing that seems too fragile to name is precisely what needs to be named. Saying less will move this further than saying more.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: Intellectually, this is effortless. Emotionally, you're both still waiting for the other to go first.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: The air feeds the fire, the fire warms the air. You both tend to enjoy this too much to notice when it tips.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: You're both good at starting things. One of you will have to become better at finishing them.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You make each other more — more energised, more expansive, occasionally more than either of you can contain.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
